nasb.text: “They shall enter My sanctuary; they shall come near to My table to minister to Me and keep My charge.

esv.text: They shall enter my sanctuary, and they shall approach my table, to minister to me, and they shall keep my charge.

cnv.text: 他們可以進入我的聖所，可以走近我的桌前來事奉我，守我所吩咐的職責。

ccb.text: 只有他们可以进入我的圣所，在我的桌前事奉我，遵行我的吩咐。
